sessions.summary: Shipped bot supervision after a 3rd silent network-drop death. WS-B #124 added an in-process reconnect watchdog; its first version false-killed a healthy idle bot (keyed off event-silence, which conflates dead with idle). #125 redesigned it to a connection-state gate (arm only while reconnecting, clear on connected) and fixed an architect-caught wiring-order blind window. Bot now runs under pm2 + pm2-windows-startup (three-layer supervision: watchdog=stuck socket, pm2=process death, startup=reboot). 511 tests. Also shipped earlier same block: D2 #121 truncation-safety + D1 #122 See-see (already logged 2026-07-12).
done: PM re-ranked supervision over #123 after the outage
#124 watchdog shipped, then false-killed idle bot
#125 connection-state gate redesign, 3-gate incl adversarial architect re-review
Fixed wiring-order blind window (register before start())
Installed pm2 + pm2-windows-startup, bot supervised + reboot-persistent
Verified pm2 auto-restarted bot twice (self-heal proven)
next: #123 chunk-and-review â€” unblocked, architect-designed, effort M

sessions.summary: Shipped #123 chunk-and-review (squash 0d1bb64): replaced the 60KB diff cut with token-budgeted file batching (splitDiffIntoChunks, 100K-token budget, chars/4, no tokenizer dep). 60KB was 6.7x below the model window so most PRs review in 1 chunk same-cost; large PRs now genuinely reviewed. runFullReview runs agents per-chunk then flat-merges; A3/dedup/validFiles stay per-PR; D2 marker demoted to last-resort via per-file truncatedFileMap. Architect adversarial verify confirmed the bytes/tokens + findings-loss regression classes absent; caught+fixed a mixed-truncation wrong-drop edge case. First impl agent died on API ConnectionRefused, reset+re-ran clean. 525 tests. Bot restarted under pm2.
done: PM confirmed #123 + guardrails from this session's 2 review misses
Architect design-review REVISE->sound (fixed 2 vacuous ACs pre-code)
Implemented chunk-and-review; recovered from mid-work API crash
3-gate: architect confirmed prior regression classes absent, fixed mixed-truncation edge case
Merged PR #47, restarted bot under pm2

sessions.summary: C4C connector epic retro prep + retro held. Git-validated two mapping claims (addresses array->defaultAddress revert; relationship UUID saved but unused by Update). Root-caused Irena prod issue: latest case ingested clean, real failure was locked C4C Communication User (403 empty body) + outbound Update IC 401. Researched email/phone API-only endpoints. Built retro HTML deck + captured retro meeting notes/follow-ups.
